name: WireframeDepth
description: Tranche 7 decomposition (work in progress). Depth + flow + person mask as standalone DNN atoms (depth_estimate_midas, optical_flow_estimate with cut_score output, person_segment). Scene-cut reset routes cut_score → math(Subtract 0.28) → math(Floor) → reset_trigger on the five state-feedback loops. Outer-card params drive a scalar graph for derived uniforms (flow_lock_strength = 0.76 + 0.225*ts01, etc.) with the legacy lerp endpoints copied byte-exact. Per-pass wgsl_compute shaders extracted from fx_wireframe_depth_compute.wgsl with bindings renumbered. THREE OF TEN passes implemented in this iteration (mesh_init, depth_temporal, semantic_mask); the remaining seven (flow_advect_coord, mesh_cell_affine, mesh_face_warp, mesh_regularize, surface_cache_update, wire_mask, update_history, composite) need extraction in a follow-up. Source → final_output passes through unchanged until the wire_mask + composite chain lands. Mesh-rate amortization dropped (was a 4K-era optimization). wire_resolution param dropped (line_history will run at chain res when wired). The DNN atoms + scene-cut reset chain + scalar graph for derived constants are validated by check-presets.
